synopsis: The Journal of Master Gnost-Dural is a book by Rob Chestney that represents an in-universe work of the same name. The book was published by Chronicle Books in 2011 and shipped in December of that year as a pack-in with the preorder collector's edition of the massively multiplayer online roleplaying game (MMORPG) Star Wars: The Old Republic.
title: The Journal of Master Gnost-Dural
